title: astragalus glycyphylloides
intro: Astragalus glycyphylloides, also known as Chinese milk vetch, is a perennial herb native to China and other parts of Asia, belonging to the legume family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. Astragalus glycyphylloides has been traditionally used to boost the immune system, reduce stress and fatigue, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory diseases such as bronchitis and pneumonia. The plant is commonly prepared as a decoction, tea, or dried extract, and can also be found in capsule or tablet form, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
